sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8869" key="a)nqrwpobore/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνθρωπο-βορέω</orth>, <sense id="n8869.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">practise cannibalism,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1264.tlg001:3:186" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chrysipp.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.186</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
